voice_dashboard_explainer: Here you can see market prices and get crop harvest advice.
voice_transport_explainer: Here you can find and share transport vehicles with other farmers.
voice_storage_explainer: Here you can book nearby cold storage for your crops.
voice_search_explainer: Here you can search for crop demand, prices, and diseases.
ai_harvesting_signal: Impact of weather on your crops
location_unavailable_default: Location unavailable. Showing Coimbatore by default.
location_detect_failed_default: Could not detect your location. Showing Coimbatore.
location_permission_denied: Location permission was denied. Allow location access in your browser.
location_unavailable: Current location is unavailable on this device.
location_timeout: Location request timed out. Try again.
location_fetch_failed: Could not refresh your current location.
location_not_found: No nearby markets or factories found for that location.
no_factories_processing: No factories processing this crop in
try_different_city_or_filter: Try a different city or clear the current filter.
bulk_desc: Sell your crops directly in bulk
camera_permission_denied: Camera permission was denied. Allow camera access in your browser.
camera_unavailable: Live camera is not available on this device.
camera_start_failed: Could not start the live camera.
take_crop_photo: Take a photo of the crop
disease_accuracy_note: For best accuracy, ensure the affected leaf is clearly visible and well-lit.
local_ai_note: This runs on-device AI in your browser. The first scan can take longer while the model loads.
disease_model_failed: The AI model could not analyze this image. Try again with a clearer leaf photo.
treatment_healthy_leaf: Leaf looks healthy. Keep monitoring, avoid overwatering, and maintain balanced nutrition.
treatment_bacterial_leaf_spot: Remove badly affected leaves, avoid overhead irrigation, and use a copper-based bactericide if required.
treatment_early_blight: Prune infected foliage, improve airflow, and apply a recommended fungicide before spread increases.
treatment_late_blight: Isolate infected plants quickly, reduce leaf wetness, and use a fast-acting blight fungicide.
treatment_leaf_rust: Remove affected leaves where possible and use a rust-control fungicide with proper field sanitation.
treatment_powdery_mildew: Reduce humidity around plants, improve spacing, and spray sulfur or another suitable mildew treatment.
treatment_mosaic_virus: Remove infected plants, disinfect tools, and control insect vectors such as aphids and whiteflies.
treatment_nutrient_deficiency: Check soil nutrition, correct the missing nutrient gradually, and monitor new leaf growth for recovery.
ai_estimate_warning: This is an on-device AI estimate. Confirm severe symptoms with an agronomist before spraying.
demo_analysis_message: The camera and upload flow work, but this app does not yet have a real disease detection model connected.
demo_analysis_next: Connect a plant-disease AI model or API to get actual results.
market_mdu_1_address: Periyar Bus Stand, Madurai, Tamil Nadu
market_try_1_address: Chatram Bus Stand, Trichy, Tamil Nadu
